Delivery Address: {{ order.delivery_address }}

Instructions: {{ order.delivery_instructions }}

{% endif %}
Payment Status: {% if order.payment_status == 'PAID' %}💰 PAID {% elif order.payment_status == 'NOT_PAID' %}❌ NOT PAID {% else %}⏳ PENDING{% endif %}
{% if order.buyer_payment_claimed_at and order.payment_status != 'PAID' %}

🔔 Buyer Claims Payment Made

Buyer marked as paid on {{ order.buyer_payment_claimed_at.strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}

Please verify payment and confirm or decline below.

{% elif order.buyer_payment_claimed_at and order.payment_status == 'PAID' %}

✅ Payment confirmed. Buyer claimed payment on {{ order.buyer_payment_claimed_at.strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}

{% endif %}
{% if order.payment_status == 'PENDING' %}
{% endif %}

You can update payment status at any time, even if buyer has marked it as paid

{% if order.status != 'DELIVERED' and order.status != 'CANCELLED' %}

This will be added to the order total

{% endif %}

Items

{% for item in order.items %}

{{ item.product_name_snapshot }}

{% if item.is_removed %} Removed {% endif %}

KSh {{ "%.2f"|format(item.unit_price_snapshot) }} x {{ item.quantity }}

{% if item.is_removed and item.removed_at %}

Removed on {{ item.removed_at.strftime('%B %d, %Y at %I:%M %p') }}

{% endif %}
{% if not item.is_removed %}
{% endif %}

KSh {{ "%.2f"|format(item.unit_price_snapshot * item.quantity) }}

{% endfor %}
Subtotal: KSh {{ "%.2f"|format(order.subtotal) }}
Delivery Fee: {% if order.delivery_fee is not none %} KSh {{ "%.2f"|format(order.delivery_fee) }} {% else %} Not set yet {% endif %}
Total: KSh {{ "%.2f"|format(order.total) }}
